sources.topology: prod waypoints table (read-only, localhost:5432/spacetraders); era_id holding the full X1-PZ28 topology
sources.markets: synthesized from real SpaceTraders reference catalog keyed to captured MARKETPLACE topology (prod market_data empty for X1-PZ28)
sources.shipyards: synthesized from real SHIP_PROBE + SHIP_COMMAND_FRIGATE reference listings keyed to captured SHIPYARD topology
sources.register: documented /register cold-start defaults (175000 cr, COSMIC, frigate + probe docked at HQ)
sources.serverStatus: OPEN era universe_reset_date from prod eras table

notes: Fixture dir named era2-* (OPEN era-2 home system); topology rows scanned under an earlier era in prod (the only X1-PZ28 topology present). Markets/shipyards synthesized, shape-faithful to the Go decode targets.
